summary: Bug fix verification complete: Location creation via LocationModal in TenantDetailPage is now working correctly. The fix disabled the duplicate inline modal (using 'false &&') so only LocationModal.jsx is used. E2E test confirmed full flow works: modal opens, form submits, API returns 200, location appears in list.
seed_data_creation: Test location PWTEST-69153 created and cleaned up after verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location creation bug is fixed. The inline modal in TenantDetailPage.jsx (lines 3299-3497) was disabled with 'false &&'. Only LocationModal.jsx component is now used.

Backend_POST_API.description: Location creation API returns 200 with success:true and location object

Frontend_Modal_Opens.description: Clicking 'Standort hinzufügen' button opens LocationModal with title 'Neuer Standort'

Frontend_Form_Submission.description: Form submission via submit button triggers handleLocationSubmit in TenantDetailPage

Frontend_Modal_Closes_After_Success.description: Modal closes after successful API response

Frontend_List_Updates.description: Location list refreshes and shows new location (217 items from 216)

Global_Search_Shows_New_Location.description: Global search finds newly created location immediately

test_flow.step5: Fill form: Location Code, Station Name, Street, PLZ, City, State
test_flow.step7: Verify modal closes and location appears in list
